description: A conveyor belt has suddenly stopped. A maintenance technician needs to respond to the corrective maintenance call.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the high-priority maintenance ticket from the CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management System).

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the ticket, indicating they are responding.

nodes.task_description: Diagnose the fault by inspecting the motor and drive system of the conveyor.

expected_outcome.value: Technician finds a snapped drive belt.

nodes.task_description: Replace the broken belt, test the conveyor, and close the maintenance ticket, logging the cause and resolution.

expected_outcome.value: Agent replaces the part, confirms the machine is running, and closes the ticket with notes.
